title: Branch Review Command Deck
concept: A dense WordPress Playground command deck that treats Vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, and ZIP import as distinct launch contracts with visible constraints, validation, progress, and resulting active Playground identity.
focus: PR and branch review console object model
dense command deck with readable keyboard-like labels
stateful browser save and Blueprint replacement flows
explicit saved, local, and temporary storage consequences
flows: Choose between Vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, and .zip import contracts with route-specific inputs and constraints

Finish Save in this browser from an unsaved state through destination choice, file-copy progress, saved row insertion, active title update, storage badge mutation, and reset action changing to Save & Reload
Save to a local directory as a distinct destination with folder permission and reconnect consequences

Select a Blueprint from an honestly labeled subset of the 43-entry gallery, inspect JSON, validate, warn about replacing current content, run progress, and update the active preview and database state
Manage saved and unsaved Playgrounds with open/manage, rename mutation, delete confirmation, final removal, and fallback to an Unsaved Playground

Use Site Manager settings, files, Blueprint, database, logs, Export to GitHub, Download as zip, database download, Adminer, phpMyAdmin, and Blueprint bundle actions without hiding the live WordPress shell
featureCoverage: Vanilla WordPress start route
WordPress PR preview route with PR number or URL
Gutenberg PR or branch route with PR, URL, or branch input
GitHub import with account connection and token-not-stored warning
Blueprint URL runner
Import .zip with native chooser and replacement warning
Blueprint gallery categories and search with representative subset labeled 6 shown of 43
Featured Blueprint shortcuts and selected Blueprint detail
Save in this browser
Save to a local directory
Save progress with file-copy counts
Saved and unsaved Playground list
Rename and delete saved Playgrounds with confirmation and final state
Active path input, refresh, Homepage, and WP Admin shortcuts
Temporary, browser-saved, and local-directory storage states
WordPress version, PHP version, language, older versions, network, and multisite settings
Destructive reset and stored Save & Reload behavior
File browser with create file, create folder, upload, browse files, selected editor, dirty state, and save result
Blueprint editor with JSON validation, copy, download bundle, run, replacement warning, progress, and result state
SQLite-backed database driver, path, size, database download, Adminer, and phpMyAdmin
Playground, WordPress, and PHP logs
Export to GitHub
Download as .zip
Portability actions for GitHub import/export, ZIP import/download, database download, and Blueprint bundles
Transfer history showing save, rename, delete, import, export, database, file, and Blueprint events
